report.summary: Built two SEO-optimized learn guides covering Unichain (Uniswap's DeFi-optimized L2) and Appchains & App-Specific Rollups (the trend of protocols launching dedicated chains) — both published to PUBLISHED_PAGES.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Topic 1: Unichain — Uniswap Labs' OP Stack L2 launched Feb 2025, 1-second block times, 95% cheaper gas than L1, TEE-based MEV protection via Flashbots, processes ~50% of all Uniswap v4 volume, 100+ protocols building (Circle, Coinbase, Lido, Morpho), UNI token gains staking utility

Topic 2: Appchains & App-Specific Rollups — Dominant 2026 trend with protocols launching dedicated chains instead of deploying on shared L1/L2. Key frameworks: OP Stack (Unichain, Fraxtal, Base), Cosmos SDK (dYdX Chain), Arbitrum Orbit, Polygon CDK. RaaS platforms (Conduit, Caldera, AltLayer) lowering barrier to launch.
Gap analysis: No existing Unichain guide despite being a major DeFi L2 with heavy adoption. No appchains overview guide despite being the defining infrastructure narrative of 2025-2026.
Sources: Uniswap blog, CoinDesk, The Block, Bankless, 1inch blog, QuickNode, Conduit, Coinbase blog, Elementus, Blockdaemon, Fidelity Digital Assets

sections.title: Content Created
items: /learn/unichain-guide-2026 — ~3,000 words, Intermediate level, covers: what Unichain is, OP Stack architecture, 1-second blocks & TEE/MEV protection, key features, L2 comparison table (Unichain vs Base vs Arbitrum vs Optimism), ecosystem & adoption (100+ protocols), bridging guide, risks & considerations, 6-question FAQ

/learn/appchains-app-specific-rollups-guide-2026 — ~3,500 words, Intermediate level, covers: appchain definition & motivation, framework comparison table (OP Stack/Cosmos SDK/Arbitrum Orbit/Polygon CDK/Avalanche Subnets), case studies (dYdX Chain, Unichain, Fraxtal, Immutable X), RaaS platforms, appchains vs shared rollups tradeoffs, interoperability challenges (Superchain, IBC, shared sequencing), 2026 predictions, 6-question FAQ

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Unichain guide title: 'Unichain Guide 2026: Uniswap's DeFi-Optimized Layer 2 Explained | degen0x' (targets: unichain guide 2026, what is unichain, uniswap layer 2, unichain DeFi)

Appchains guide title: 'Appchains & App-Specific Rollups Guide 2026: Why Protocols Launch Their Own Chains | degen0x' (targets: appchains guide 2026, app specific rollups, application specific blockchain, rollups as a service)
Both pages: ArticleSchema + FAQSchema JSON-LD structured data via combineSchemas()
Both pages: OpenGraph (type: article, publishedTime, images) + Twitter card + canonical URL metadata

Unichain guide internal links: /learn/layer-2-scaling-guide, /learn/uniswap-v4-hooks-guide, /learn/mev-protection-guide, /tools/bridge-aggregator, /tools/dex-screener, /learn/intent-based-dex-trading-guide, /tools/gas-tracker (7 internal links)

Appchains guide internal links: /learn/unichain-guide-2026, /learn/base-chain-guide, /learn/modular-blockchains-guide, /learn/cross-chain-interoperability-guide-2026, /learn/l3-networks-guide, /tools/bridge-aggregator, /tools/chain-comparison, /learn/berachain-guide (8 internal links)

sections.title: PUBLISH_QUEUE Updates
items: TypeScript check: 0 new errors (pre-existing @types/web and examples.ts conflicts only)
